paper.title_en: Horizon Microstructure Thermodynamics in AdS Black Holes: Smarr-Consistent Excitation Enthalpy
paper.abstract_en: In this work we formulate a horizon-microstructure description of four-dimensional AdS black holes in which a horizon of area $A$ is resolved into $\mathcal{N}=A/a_p$ microscopic sites and $N$ occupied horizon sites. The central result is that the combinatorics of this partially occupied horizon sector yields the entropy directly: in the finite-filling regime the leading term is proportional to the area, and the maximal-entropy filling reproduces the Bekenstein--Hawking law with $a_p=4\ln 2\ \ell_{p}^{2}$. Subleading corrections include a subtractive logarithmic term and an inverse-area expansion. We then show that this partially occupied regime admits a thermodynamic justification from an extended first law with chemical potential $μ$, a Smarr-consistent excitation enthalpy $δM(A,P,N)$, and an AdS control parameter $u=PS$. In this interpretation, the combinatorics provides the dominant horizon entropy, while the thermodynamic sector supplies a dressing that selects the equilibrium filling and assigns a finite excitation cost to departures from a reference partially occupied configuration.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 论文构建了AdS黑洞视界微观结构的组合模型，直接导出熵的Bekenstein-Hawking形式及修正项，并给出热力学解释，理论深度高、创新性强，主题匹配。
decision.title_zh: AdS黑洞中的视界微观结构热力学：Smarr一致的激发焓
decision.abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们构建了一个四维AdS黑洞的视界微观结构描述，其中面积为$A$的视界被分解为$\mathcal{N}=A/a_p$个微观位点和$N$个占据的视界位点。核心结果是，这个部分占据的视界扇区的组合学直接给出了熵：在有限填充区域内，主导项与面积成正比，而最大熵填充重现了Bekenstein-Hawking定律，其中$a_p=4\ln 2\ \ell_{p}^{2}$。次主导修正包括一个可减的对数项和一个反面积展开。然后我们证明，这个部分占据的区域可以从一个包含化学势$μ$的扩展第一定律、一个Smarr一致的激发焓$δM(A,P,N)$以及一个AdS控制参数$u=PS$中得到热力学上的合理性。在这种解释中，组合学提供了主导的视界熵，而热力学扇区提供了一种修整，它选择了平衡填充，并为偏离参考部分占据构型分配了一个有限的激发代价。
